mapper.select:
SELECT import_id, import_name, table_name, file_name, file_path, total_count, success_count, fail_count, status, remark FROM data_import
AND import_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{importName}, '%')
AND table_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tableName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT import_id, import_name, table_name, file_name, file_path, total_count, success_count, fail_count, status, remark FROM data_import WHERE import_id = #{importId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO data_import (import_name, table_name, file_name, file_path, total_count, success_count, fail_count, status, remark, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{importName}, #{tableName}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{totalCount}, #{successCount}, #{failCount}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE data_import SET import_name = #{importName}, table_name = #{tableName}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_path = #{filePath}, total_count = #{totalCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, fail_count = #{failCount}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE import_id = #{importId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM data_import WHERE import_id IN
#{importId}
